meaning: Penis. The foundation of Eastern Slavic 'Mat'.
cultural_context: Highly versatile. Can be a noun, or modified to mean 'everything is fucked' (hujovo), 'excellent' (ohuyenno), or 'go fuck yourself' (idi na khuy).
example_usage: Іди на хуй! (Idi na khuy! - Go to the dick! / Fuck off!)

meaning: Nonsense, a bad situation, or a useless object.
cultural_context: Derived from khuy. Used constantly to describe anything broken, useless, or untrue.
example_usage: Що це за хуйня? (Scho tse za khuynya? - What the fuck is this bullshit?)

meaning: Female genitalia.
cultural_context: Extremely vulgar. Often used to signal complete physical or metaphorical destruction ('Pizdets' = utter disaster / we are fucked).
example_usage: Оце пізда. (Otse pizda. - This is a total disaster/cunt.)

meaning: A catastrophic failure, a dead end, or something incredibly horrible.
cultural_context: One of the most used words during times of crisis to mean absolute catastrophe.
example_usage: Це повний пиздець! (Tse povniy pyzdets! - This is a complete disaster!)

meaning: A prostitute. Also practically punctuation.
cultural_context: Used in the exact identical grammatical way as 'fuck' in English—as an interjection of pain, anger, or general stress.
example_usage: Блядь, я забув! (Blyad, ya zabuv! - Fuck, I forgot!)

meaning: A female dog.
cultural_context: Widely used to insult people of any gender who are acting malicious, or as an interjection of rage (often combined 'suka blyad').
example_usage: Сука ти! (Suka ty! - You bitch!)

meaning: A prostitute.
cultural_context: A native Ukrainian/Polish/Western Slavic curse for a whore. Used similarly to blyad, but feels slightly more traditional to Western Ukraine.
example_usage: Курва мать! (Kurva mat! - Whore mother! / Dammit!)

meaning: The buttocks or anus.
cultural_context: Not heavy 'Mat', but a native Ukrainian scatological vulgarity. Used to mean someone is in deep trouble.
example_usage: Йди в сраку! (Ydy v sraku! - Go to the ass! / Fuck off!)

meaning: Feces.
cultural_context: Standard word for shit. Often used to describe something of terrible quality.
example_usage: Це повне гівно. (Tse povne hivno. - This is total shit.)

meaning: Someone who soils themselves, or roughly 'little shit'.
cultural_context: Often used to dismiss a younger or annoying person.
example_usage: Малий засранець. (Malyy zasranets. - Little shit.)

meaning: Historically derived from 'mudo' (testicle). Now means a complete, insensitive asshole.
cultural_context: The perfect word for a selfish, arrogant man who ruins things for others.
example_usage: Який мудак! (Yakyy mudak! - What an asshole!)

meaning: The infinitive verb for sexual intercourse.
cultural_context: Another massive root word in Slavic cursing.
example_usage: Мені це не їбе. (Meni tse ne yibe. - I don't give a fuck about this / This doesn't fuck me.)

meaning: Using the prefix 'do-' (until/reaching) with fuck. Means to harass someone relentlessly for no reason.
cultural_context: Common complaint when police or annoying people bother you.
example_usage: Чого ти до мене доїбався? (Choho ty do mene doyibavsya? - Why the fuck are you picking on me?)

english_equivalent: you've annoyed the fuck out of me / I'm sick of this
meaning: To tire someone out or annoy them to the absolute maximum limit.
cultural_context: Very common exclamation of exhaustion.
example_usage: Ти мене заїбав. (Ty mene zayibav. - You annoyed the fuck out of me.)

english_equivalent: to be fucking astounded / to lose one's fucking mind
meaning: To be completely shocked, or to act incredibly arrogant/insane.
cultural_context: A versatile verb applying 'khuy' to a mental state.
example_usage: Ти охуїв? (Ty okhuyiv? - Have you lost your fucking mind?)

meaning: Bizarrely, when 'khuy' is modified this way, it means something is incredibly good.
cultural_context: Used to describe something amazing, like a great movie or victory.
example_usage: Фільм охуєнний! (Film okhuyennyy! - The movie is fucking awesome!)

meaning: A homosexual man.
cultural_context: A severe homophobic slur, universally used to describe corrupt politicians, traitors, or generally terrible men.
example_usage: Всі політики - підараси. (Vsi polityky - pidarasy. - All politicians are faggots/bastards.)

meaning: A condom.
cultural_context: Calling someone a condom implies they are a disposable, useless scumbag.
example_usage: Він повний гандон. (Vin povniy gandon. - He is a complete scumbag/condom.)

meaning: A tramp or a woman of ill repute.
cultural_context: More of a native Ukrainian word, slightly less severe than blyad.
example_usage: Дешева шльондра. (Desheva shlyondra. - Cheap tramp.)

meaning: A child born from a whore (blyad).
cultural_context: An intensely severe biological insult.
example_usage: Маленький виблядок! (Malenkyy vyblyadok! - Little whore-spawn!)

meaning: Refers to a mythical house spirit or the devil.
cultural_context: A very classic, polite Ukrainian curse for 'damn it'.
example_usage: Якого дідька? (Yakoho didka? - What the devil?)

meaning: A demon or devil.
cultural_context: Used to express frustration without heavy vulgarity.
example_usage: Чорт забирай! (Chort zabyray! - The devil take it! / Damn it!)

meaning: A foolish person.
cultural_context: A standard, non-vulgar insult.
example_usage: Ти просто дурень. (Ty prosto duren. - You're just a fool.)

meaning: A portmanteau of hitting/hammering (dovbaty) and fucking (yob). Means someone astoundingly stupid.
cultural_context: One of the favorite insults for calling out breathtaking incompetence.
example_usage: Який же він довбойоб! (Yakyy zhe vin dovboyob! - What a fucking idiot he is!)

meaning: A creature that looks completely destroyed/fucked up.
cultural_context: Used against extremely ugly objects or morally/physically repulsive people.
example_usage: Глянь на це уйобіще. (Hlyan na tse uyobishche. - Look at this freak.)

meaning: A promiscuous woman.
cultural_context: A native Ukrainian word for a slut, distinct from Russian imports.
example_usage: Вона така хвойда. (Vona taka khvoyda. - She is such a slut.)

meaning: A horrible, treacherous person or group.
cultural_context: Derived from dragging things on the floor. Meaning literal trash.
example_usage: Ти сволота! (Ty svolota! - You scum!)

meaning: A vile, disgusting, or treacherous individual.
cultural_context: Gender neutral but often aimed at women. A heavy character insult without explicit vulgar roots.
example_usage: От паскуда! (Ot paskuda! - What a vile bastard!)

meaning: A rotting carcass.
cultural_context: Used to describe a hyper-manipulative, cold, and cruel woman.
example_usage: Хитра стерво. (Khytra stervo. - Cunning bitch.)

meaning: Meaning something reaches only up to the level of the dick, ergo, it doesn't matter.
cultural_context: The standard expression of total apathy.
example_usage: Мені похуй! (Meni pokhuy! - I don't give a fuck!)

english_equivalent: fuck off / to hell with it
meaning: Telling someone to go sit on a dick, or declaring an object/idea to be discarded.
cultural_context: The most famous wartime slogan of Ukraine (Russian warship, idi nakhuy).
example_usage: Йди нахуй. (Ydy nakhuy. - Go fuck yourself.)

meaning: A person who embodies a dick.
cultural_context: Famous globally in Ukraine due to the chant 'Putin khuylo' (Putin is a dickhead) coined by football ultras in 2014.
example_usage: Путін — хуйло! (Putin khuylo! - [Self-explanatory])

meaning: Covered in shit.
cultural_context: Used as a descriptor for anything broken or annoying.
example_usage: Цей сраний телефон. (Tsey sranyy telefon. - This shitty phone.)

meaning: Someone who has been hit in the head with a fuck/heavy blow, causing severe brain damage.
cultural_context: Used to describe someone acting completely insane or dangerously stupid.
example_usage: Ти що, йобнутий? (Ty scho, yobnutyy? - What are you, fucking crazy?)

meaning: A pronunciation/spelling variant of 'blyad' ending with a soft 't' instead of 'd'.
cultural_context: Used purely as an interjection, losing its literal meaning of 'whore'. Often used even by people who try not to swear heavily.
example_usage: Блять, як боляче. (Blyat, yak bolyache. - Fuck, that hurts.)

meaning: A collective noun for a bunch of cunts.
cultural_context: Useful for describing a corrupt government, a bad group of kids, or enemy forces.
example_usage: Вся ця пездота. (Vsya tsya pezdota. - All these scumbags.)

meaning: To speak nonsense, derived from 'manda' (cunt).
cultural_context: Telling someone they are speaking absolute vagina/nonsense.
example_usage: Досить мандіти! (Dosyt mandity! - Stop talking bullshit!)

meaning: Alternate spelling/pronunciation of pyzdets.
cultural_context: Universal Slavic declaration of impending doom.
example_usage: Ну все, піздєц. (Nu vse, pizdets. - Well that's it, it's a disaster/we're fucked.)

meaning: The exposed head of a penis or the foreskin.
cultural_context: Used to describe an arrogant idiot or an incredibly bad situation.
example_usage: Кінська залупа. (Kinska zalupa. - Horse dickhead.)

meaning: A root vegetable. Used as a safe euphemism for 'khuy'.
cultural_context: A completely socially acceptable way to swear in front of grandmothers.
example_usage: Якого хріна? (Yakoho khrina? - What the horseradish/hell?)

meaning: A cute little chicken.
cultural_context: A classic Western Ukrainian euphemism for 'kurva'.
example_usage: Курча мати! (Kurcha maty! - Chicken mother!/Dammit!)

meaning: A child whose nose runs (shmarki).
cultural_context: An older person insulting a younger person's lack of experience.
example_usage: Малий шмаркач. (Malyy shmarkach. - Little snot.)

meaning: Someone made of shit or who deals in shit.
cultural_context: Very common insult for an annoying teenage boy.
example_usage: Ти просто гівняр. (Ty prosto hivnyar. - You're just a little shit.)

meaning: Someone who farts silently.
cultural_context: A comedic insult for a coward or someone weak.
example_usage: Старий бздюх. (Staryy bzdyukh. - Old farter.)

meaning: An acronym historically meaning 'morally devoid individual' or simply a pathetic loser.
cultural_context: Used to describe someone who is physically pathetic and morally weak.
example_usage: Він таке чмо. (Vin take chmo. - He is such a loser.)

meaning: Someone who has degenerated from their species or family line.
cultural_context: A very cold, calculating insult marking someone as a genetic or moral failure.
example_usage: Ти виродок! (Ty vyrodok! - You degenerate!)

meaning: A curse wishing blindness upon someone.
cultural_context: Part of the very traditional Ukrainian cursing style: wishing obscure physical harm. Used when someone isn't looking where they are going.
example_usage: Щоб тобі повилазило, куди преш! (Hope your eyes pop out, where are you pushing!)

meaning: To slap, or in slang, to kill someone or drink a shot.
cultural_context: Mob/street slang.
example_usage: Зараз тебе шльопну. (Zaraz tebe shlopnu. - I'll smack/kill you right now.)

meaning: Literally coated in feces. Used to modify something ruined.
cultural_context: Universal adjective for a bad object or place.
example_usage: Цей засраний дощ. (Tsey zasranyy doshch. - This shitty rain.)

meaning: Fucked.
cultural_context: The exact equivalent of the English adjective 'fucking'.
example_usage: Йобаний насос! (Yobanyy nasos! - Fucking pump! [Random exclamation])

meaning: A noun for a silly, foolish, completely dumbass person.
cultural_context: The '-ko' suffix makes it sound weirdly cute/diminutive, contrasting sharply with the 'fuck' root.
example_usage: Оце їбанько! (Otse yibanko! - What a fucking idiot!)

meaning: Truncated version of '(I fucked) your mother'.
cultural_context: Used in the exact same manner as English 'motherfucker' or 'dammit' when something goes wrong.
example_usage: Йоб твою мать! (Yob tvoyu mat! - Fuck your mother!)

meaning: Juvenile word for penis.
cultural_context: Used to describe an arrogant young boy who thinks he's tough.
example_usage: Мовчи, пісюк. (Movchy, pisyuk. - Shut up, little prick.)

meaning: Adverb meaning terribly/bad.
cultural_context: Euphemism for Khuyovo.
example_usage: Мені хріново. (Meni khrinovo. - I feel like crappy/shit.)

meaning: Adverb meaning terribly/fucked up.
cultural_context: The extreme version of khrinovo. Describes a terrible mental/physical state or the weather.
example_usage: Сьогодні все хуйово. (Sohodni vse khuyovo. - Today everything is fucked up.)

meaning: A big devil.
cultural_context: Used for an annoying person or situation.
example_usage: Старий чортяка! (Staryy chortyaka! - Old devil!)

meaning: Male form of 'shit-person'.
cultural_context: Similar to hivnyar.
example_usage: От гівнюк малий! (Ot hivnyuk malyy! - What a little shit!)

meaning: Another, slightly older word for female genitalia.
cultural_context: Deeply offensive, just like pizda.
example_usage: Тупа манда. (Tupa manda. - Stupid cunt.)

english_equivalent: to bullshit / to steal / to beat up
meaning: Applying the root of 'cunt' to a verb.
cultural_context: Another insanely versatile Slavic curse verb. Can mean to lie wildly, to steal a physical object, or to violently beat someone up.
example_usage: Не пизди! (Ne pyzdy! - Don't talk bullshit/lie!)

meaning: Broadly means grandmother, but used derogatorily it means an ignorant peasant woman.
cultural_context: Calling a modern woman a 'baba' implies she is old, fat, uneducated, and gossips too much.
example_usage: Дурна баба! (Durna baba! - Stupid old hag!)

meaning: Wishing death. Crucially, the verb 'zdokh' applies to animals dying, not humans.
cultural_context: Telling a human to die like a dog.
example_usage: Щоб ти здох, падло! (Drop dead, you animal corpse!)

meaning: A rotting animal carcass.
cultural_context: Used to describe someone entirely devoid of morals.
example_usage: Ти брехливе падло. (Ty brekhlyve padlo. - You lying scum.)

meaning: Originally the letter 'Kh' in the old Cyrillic alphabet, used as a euphemism for Khuy.
cultural_context: Much lighter than Khuy. Used broadly by almost everyone.
example_usage: Пішов нахер! (Pishov nakher! - Go to dick/screw off!)

meaning: A contraction of 'yakiy khuy' (what dick?).
cultural_context: The standard aggressive response asking 'why the hell?'.
example_usage: Хулі ти мовчиш? (Khuli ty movchysh? - Why the fuck are you silent?)

meaning: A physical beating. Getting your ass kicked.
cultural_context: When someone is threatening you, they promise to 'give you pizdyuli'.
example_usage: Зараз отримаєш піздюлей. (Zaraz otrymayesh pizdyuley. - Now you're going to get a fucking beating.)

meaning: A profoundly stupid, gullible person who gets scammed.
cultural_context: Originally 1990s mafia slang for the 'fish' they would con. Now widely used to describe a total loser.
example_usage: Без лоха і жизнь плоха. (Bez lokha i zhizn plokha. - Without a sucker, life is bad [conman proverb].)

meaning: Son of a whore.
cultural_context: Translated equivalent, heavily tied to western Ukrainian linguistic styling rather than the Russian 'sukin syn'.
example_usage: Ти, курвий сину! (Ty, kurvyy synu! - You son of a bitch!)

meaning: Historically an imperial Russian soldier. Now an intensely charged slur for Russian imperialists/invaders.
cultural_context: The most prominent political/ethnic slur in modern Ukraine. Refers specifically to hostile Russians, distinct from the neutral 'rosiyanyn'.
example_usage: Смерть москалям. (Smert moskalyam - Death to muscovites.)

meaning: An older slur for Russians comparing their historic long beards to goats, or derived from Turkic 'butcher' (kassap).
cultural_context: An alternate to moskal, heavily used to strip humanity from the invading forces.
example_usage: Кацапські свині. (Katsapski svyni. - Katsap pigs.)

meaning: A derogatory collective noun for the entire nation/military of Russia.
cultural_context: Born from the modern war to dehumanize the opposing army into a swarm of insects or vermin.
example_usage: Русня йде. (Rusnya yde. - The rusnya is coming.)

meaning: Literally Tolkien's Orcs.
cultural_context: The universal term enthusiastically adopted by the Ukrainian military and society in 2022 to describe the invading Russian army (implying they are savage, ugly, looting beasts from the East).
example_usage: Орки знову стріляють. (Orky znovu strilyayut. - The orcs are shooting again.)

english_equivalent: a plague on you / damn it
meaning: Historically invoked the shaking plague.
cultural_context: A deeply traditional Ukrainian curse word.
example_usage: Трясця твоїй матері! (Tryastsya tvoiy materi! - A fever on your mother!/Dammit!)

meaning: A slightly formally elevated word for shit compared to 'hivno', but identical in usage.
cultural_context: Used for bad people or worthless objects.
example_usage: Собаче лайно. (Sobache layno. - Dog crap.)

meaning: The buttocks. A crossover from Polish.
cultural_context: Less severe than 'sraka'. Almost socially acceptable.
example_usage: Повна дупа. (Povna dupa. - Total ass / big mess.)

meaning: A portmanteau of pig and dog.
cultural_context: A modern insult specifically engineered to uniquely insult Russian invaders by combining two unclean animals. Gained massive popularity online.
example_usage: Йобані свинособаки. (Yobani svynosobaky. - Fucking pig-dogs.)

meaning: Placing a dick contextually next to the problem to signify giving up.
cultural_context: The ultimate phrase of abandoning a failed project or annoying situation.
example_usage: Не працює? Ну і хуй з ним. (Doesn't work? Well, fuck it then.)

meaning: A slight variation of yobnutyy.
cultural_context: Used to describe someone completely out of their mind.
example_usage: Він зовсім єбанутий. (Vin zovsym yebanutyy. - He is completely batshit.)

meaning: An augmentative form of kurva.
cultural_context: Makes the insult feel dramatically larger and more devastating.
example_usage: Старе курвище. (Stare kurvyshche. - Old massive whore.)

english_equivalent: I am sick and fucking tired of this
meaning: A combination of reaching 100/the limit (sto) and cunt (pizda) applied to a situation.
cultural_context: The poetic height of fatigue vocabulary.
example_usage: Як же мені це остопизділо! (Yak zhe meni tse ostopyzdilo! - How incredibly sick and fucking tired I am of this!)

meaning: A noun derived from the 'fuck' root, describing an object or event that is completely useless and broken.
cultural_context: Often describing cheap tools or nonsense tasks.
example_usage: Якась китайська поїбень. (Yakas kytayska poyiben. - Some Chinese junk/bullshit.)
